operational_knowledge_units.title: Reset Metrics API is called when UPS cycles a sort
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that when UPS cycles a sort, it calls an API named Reset Metrics.
observed_evidence: When UPS cycles a sort they call and API called Reset Metrics.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Sorter Sweeper Database Sort Model: when UPS cycles a sort, it calls the Reset Metrics API.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Reset Metrics opens closed chutes during sort cycling
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide indicates that Reset Metrics opens any chutes that are currently closed as part of cycling a sort.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: During sort cycle processing, the Reset Metrics API opens any closed chutes.

operational_knowledge_units.title: New SortName and SortGuid are created for each sort cycle
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The sort model creates a new SortName and SortGuid when a sort is cycled.
observed_evidence: creates a new SortName and SortGuid
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Sorter Sweeper Database Sort Model creates a new SortName and SortGuid when Reset Metrics is called during a sort cycle.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Sort activity is historically logged by SortName and SortGuid
operational_knowledge_units.summary: All activity is logged with SortName and SortGuid so historical metrics can be tracked from sort to sort.
observed_evidence: All activity is logged with these fields for historical metrics sort to sort.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: All sorter activity is logged using SortName and SortGuid to support historical metrics from sort to sort.
